completed_tasks.name: Skybox vertical slice: skybox.gdshader + SkyboxRenderer + TierClassifier + Main.tscn wiring
Star magnitude model + RND-07 handoff baseline — then REWORKED post-play-test into unified physically-coherent star rendering
EcoSpace.Tests: TierClassifier full-matrix xUnit tests (16/16 green)

remaining_tasks.name: Phase 02 post-execution gates: code-review → regression → verify_phase_goal (gsd-verifier) → update_roadmap (mark phase complete) → transition to Phase 03

decisions.decision: Unified star rendering in Scripts/Render/StarRendering.cs — a star's size and brightness derive ONLY from its per-instance Luminosity/RadiusMeters/BaseColor; mesh and skybox use the IDENTICAL rules
decisions.rationale: User required mesh↔skybox coherence, one shared brightness parameter, hue preservation, and minimal global config

decisions.decision: Brightness = inverse-square flux (L/d²) through a magnitude (log10) curve clamped to [0,1]; ONE global knob StarRendering.Exposure (editor: WorldRenderer.StarBrightness)
decisions.rationale: Sun@1AU vs sibling@8ly differ ~1e10 in flux; no single LINEAR scale shows both without saturating to white. Log curve compresses the range so one exposure works for both and hue survives.

decisions.decision: Size = physical angular radius R/d, identical mesh+sky, sky disc floored at one screen pixel (resolution limit, not artificial enhancement). Removed all prior global star knobs.
decisions.rationale: Previous magnitude-ranked disc sizing produced huge white spheres; stars are unresolved point sources.

next_action: Re-run /gsd-execute-phase 02. All three plans have SUMMARY.md, so plan discovery skips them and proceeds to the post-execution gates: code-review, regression, then the gsd-verifier (verify_phase_goal) against the ROADMAP Phase 2 goal + RND-05/RND-07, then mark phase complete and transition to Phase 03. No implementation work remains — verification/completion tail only.
context_notes: Phase 02 (dynamic skybox) plan execution is complete. 02-02 was reworked across 3 extra commits on main AFTER its SUMMARY was first written, in response to play-test feedback: (1) point-source stars (constant size) — fix(02-02); (2) coherent per-star physics refactor introducing StarRendering.cs — refactor(02-02); (3) unified one-exposure magnitude brightness for mesh+sky — refactor(02-02). The user APPROVED the final look. Build clean (0/0), 16/16 unit tests green. Verifier should note STATE frontmatter already shows completed_phases:2 optimistically — confirm via VERIFICATION.md rather than assume. Visible Star↔Galaxy mesh/skybox handoff is still Phase-3 deferred (D-24); Phase 2 built only the handoff baseline accessors (SkyboxRenderer.GetSkyDirection + WorldRenderer.GetRenderPosition).
